title: Better Chat Hide
description:
Hides the Minecraft Chat unless opened
(Command Is Toggleable)
body:
This mod ensures that your chat remains hidden unless you manually open it, and only functions when the mod is toggled.

I found this mod convienent for streaming, as it removes the hassle of having to go into Options > Chat Settings and manually toggle the chat on and off whenever I need it. It's also really convenient for clipping footage for montages, preventing the chat from ruining the clip!
CREDS-TO-GUFL
